On November 19, 2025, Freight Technologies, Inc. entered into several strategic agreements to enhance its operational capabilities and expand its AI-driven automation in logistics. data.title: Nouveau Monde Graphite Releases Updated Feasibility Study for Matawinie Mine
data.description:
TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Nouveau Monde Mining ( (TSE:NOU) ) has shared an update.

On November 12, 2025, Nouveau Monde Graphite Inc. announced the results of an updated feasibility study for its Phase-2 Matawinie Mine, conducted in accordance with the National Instrument 43-101 standards. The study, which excluded the Phase 2 of the Bécancour Battery Material Plant, reaffirmed the technical and economic viability of the mine, projecting a 25-year life span with an annual processing rate of 2.56 million tonnes. The feasibility study highlighted a capital expenditure of US$421 million and an annual operating cost of US$44 million, with an after-tax internal rate of return of 15.8%. The study also identified potential risks related to construction productivity, equipment delivery times, and contractor bids, but noted the project’s resilience to variations in capital and operating costs.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:NOU) stock is a Buy with a C$4.70 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Nouveau Monde Mining stock, see the TSE:NOU Stock Forecast page.

Nouveau Monde Graphite Inc. operates in the mining industry, focusing on the extraction and production of graphite. Aris Mining ( (TSE:ARIS) ) has shared an update.

On November 20, 2025, Aris Mining Corporation announced its agreement to acquire the remaining 49% interest in the Soto Norte joint venture from MDC Industry Holding Company LLC for $80 million. This acquisition will grant Aris Mining full ownership of Soto Norte, enhancing its project pipeline and positioning the company to achieve its goal of producing 1 million ounces of gold annually. The transaction is expected to close by early December 2025, subject to customary conditions. This strategic move is anticipated to significantly increase Aris Mining’s total gold mineral reserves and resources, providing a strong foundation for long-term growth and profitability.
